title: polemonium foliosissimum subsp. verum
intro: Polemonium foliosissimum subsp. verum, also known as Jacob's Ladder, is a perennial plant species in the borage family (Boraginaceae) native to North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been attributed to its alkaloid and glycoside content. The health benefits of Polemonium foliosissimum subsp. verum include its potential to soothe respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to treat wounds and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
